betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Crystal Seeds grow into full crystals when placed in water source blocks. Three types exist:

Certus Quartz Seed (material:0) — grows from Certus Quartz Crystal dust
Nether Quartz Seed (material:600) — grows from Nether Quartz dust
Fluix Seed (material:1200) — grows from Fluix Dust

Place the seed in a water block. It progresses through 4 growth stages, dropping 1× Pure Crystal per stage, then 1× full Crystal when mature. Total yield: 4× Pure Crystal + 1× Crystal per seed.

Growth takes ~20 minutes per stage in still water. A Crystal Growth Accelerator speeds this up dramatically.

Tip: Set up a water pool with accelerators for automated crystal farming. This is the primary source of Pure Crystals needed for processors.
